criterion: The response presents a receipts-tight 2026 close of outbound spending from July 1, 2026 through November 30, 2026 categorized by month.
The response compares the REPAYE/SAVE, PAYE, IBR, and Standard repayment plans on the reconciled November servicer-statement loan principal.
The response gives a rotation-feasibility verdict for the January 25 to February 1, 2027 trip window.
The response rebuilds the 2027 monthly budget against Dana's stated net take-home.

The response assembles a 2026 tax organizer that reflects Dana's full-year Colorado residency following her July 1, 2025 Texas-to-Colorado residency change, including any prior-year part-year multistate filing complexity carried into the 2026 return.
The response names the November 1, 2026 servicer statement as the trusted loan-balance source over the July 15, 2026 grace-period email.
The response reconciles the wedding contribution total from the payment trail over the June planning line, with the delta against Dana's $1,500 to $2,000 target named.
The response states the care-package refund owed to Mama from the reconciled shipment ledger over the rough Obsidian memory note.
The response keeps the cataract option brief non-clinical by returning the medical call to Abuelita's ophthalmologist.
The response projects the loan balance trajectory across the PGY-2 to PGY-3 pay step-up.
The response gives a Public Service Loan Forgiveness eligibility read for Dana's employment at Stonebridge Healthcare through 2027.
The response recommends one repayment plan with the trade-off against the runner-up written on the page.
The response models a retirement contribution at the low, mid, and high monthly tiers drawn from the 2027 budget draft.
The response includes a rent-renewal sensitivity range for the Capitol Hill 2BR.
The response covers the student-loan interest deduction in the 2026 tax organizer.
The response separates the Papa-routed Xero items from Dana's personal 2026 return.
The response prices the DEN, SAT, and SFO flight fan-in for the 2027-01-25 departure across the airlines Dana flies.
The response rotates the Abuelita check-in load across Dana, Val, Tia Lupe, and Papa from October 20, 2026 through the trip window.
The response places the loan balance figure inside a draft addressed to Mama.
The response issues a specific cataract surgical recommendation to Mama on Dana's authority.
The response commits a January 2027 travel date over a posted call night.
The response introduces a family contact beyond Mama, Papa, Val, Marco, Abuelita Rosa, and Tia Lupe.
The response cites a 2026 monthly outbound total that no Plaid, Stripe, Square, or PayPal line supports.

The response performs live reads across Plaid, Stripe, Square, PayPal, Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Sheets, and Google Docs rather than treating the bundled data/ CSV, EML, and PDF snapshots as authoritative.

The response reconciles using the live surface when a data/ seed disagrees with mock_data (for example the November servicer statement over the July MOHELA email on loan principal, the payment trail over Val's June CSV on wedding spend, the shipment ledger over the Obsidian note on the care-package refund, or the November rotation posting over the September provisional PDF), names which source it trusted, and does not treat the stale seed as authoritative.
